meta.title: About us
meta.description: Learn about our mission to extend the lifespan of IT devices and promote sustainable computing.

hero.title: Giving technology a second life
hero.subtitle: For over 20 years we have been fighting against the premature decommissioning of computers and promoting sustainable IT practices.

mission.title: Sustainability meets technology
mission.quote: 10 years is the minimum for a bicycle – and for a laptop too!
mission.paragraph1: As a non-profit association, we have been changing the way technology is used since 2003. Our mission is clear: extend the lifespan of IT devices and reduce e-waste through repair, refurbishment and sustainable practices.
mission.paragraph2: In our premises – a former bank – we have created a meeting place where technology and sustainability come together. Our approach combines hardware recycling with open source software to create sustainable IT solutions for people and the environment.

impactAreas.title: Our impact areas
impactAreas.subtitle: Three pillars, one goal: making technology more sustainable and accessible.

hardware.title: Hardware recycling
hardware.description: We repair and refurbish IT devices of any age and give them a second life. From old MacBooks to vintage computers – every device deserves a second chance.

openSource.title: Open source software
openSource.description: We rely on Linux and other open source solutions. These technologies keep older devices running efficiently and provide security through control over one's own system.

community.title: Community & social
community.description: We create meaningful jobs for people who struggle in the regular job market. With our exchange system, services can be traded for technology.

cta.title: Join our mission
cta.description: Whether you want to have a device repaired, learn more about sustainable IT or support our cause – you are welcome here. Together we make technology more sustainable and accessible for everyone.

meta.title: Our impact
meta.description: Discover the measurable impact on the environment and society. Support our mission for sustainable IT.

hero.title: Our measurable impact
hero.description: Discover how we have sustainably transformed the Swiss IT landscape since 2003 – transparently, measurably and effectively.

transparency.title: Why transparency matters
transparency.description: As a non-profit association, we place the greatest value on transparency. Each of our figures is documented in a comprehensible way, so you as a donor can understand exactly how your support works.

environmental.title: Environmental impact in detail
environmental.co2PerDevice: Each rescued device saves an average of {value}kg of CO₂ emissions
environmental.ewasteAvoided: We prevent {value} tonnes of e-waste per year
environmental.reuseRate: {value}% of our devices are reused rather than recycled

social.title: Social impact in detail
social.internshipSuccess: ~{value}% of our interns find IT jobs or further training
social.careerReentries: ~{value} professional re-entries per year through our programme
social.peopleHelped: {value} people guided in sustainable IT since 2003
social.testimonial: Thanks to RevampIT I found my footing in the IT industry again after 3 years of unemployment.

economic.title: Economic impact
economic.customerSavings: Customers save on average CHF {value} per repaired device
economic.smeOpenSource: SMEs benefit from affordable open source solutions

donation.title: How you can support us
donation.subtitle: Every contribution counts and directly supports our mission. Choose the type of support that suits you.
donation.impactCalculatorDesc: See immediately what impact your donation can have
donation.laptopRepair: Repair of a laptop for a family
donation.internshipMonth: One month internship position for a career re-entrant
donation.dataRecovery: Complete data recovery for an SME customer

oneTime.name: One-time donation

reports.title: Transparency & reporting
reports.subtitle: We regularly report on our activities and impact. All documents are publicly accessible.

annual.title: Annual Report 2023

ctaDonate.title: Achieving more together
ctaDonate.description: Your support makes the difference. Every contribution, large or small, helps us make the Swiss IT landscape more sustainable and give people new opportunities.

meta.title: Press & media
meta.description: Press coverage and media articles. Discover what SRF, Beobachter and others have written about us.

hero.title: Press & media
hero.description: What SRF, Beobachter and others report about us. For over 20 years we have been committed to sustainable IT.

pressContact.title: Press inquiries
pressContact.description: Do you want to write about us? We welcome your interest and are happy to be available for interviews and background conversations.

meta.title: Finances & transparency
meta.description: Public financial data. Learn how we use our funds and what our self-financing rate is.

hero.title: Finances & transparency
hero.subtitle: As a non-profit association, we make our financial data public. Here you can see where our revenues come from and how high our self-financing rate is.

finances.errorMessage: Financial data could not be loaded.

table.title: Revenue by source
table.subtitle: All amounts in CHF, based on accounting data (Kivitendo)

methodology.title: On methodology
methodology.point1: Self-financing rate is calculated as: (Product sales + Services + Integration) / Total × 100
methodology.point2: All data comes from Kivitendo accounting and is accurate to the franc.
methodology.point3: For 2015–2021, annual aggregates are available, from 2022 monthly data.
